en: King Nebuchadnezzar to all peo- ples, nations, and languages, that dwell in all the earth: Peace be multiplied to you!
zh: 尼布甲尼撒王向住在全地的各國、各族和說各種語言的人宣告說：“願你們大享平安！

en: It has seemed good to me to show the signs and wonders that the Most High God has done for me.
zh: 我樂意把至高的 神向我所行的神蹟奇事宣揚出來。

en: How great are his signs, how mighty his wonders! His kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and his dominion endures from generation to generation.
zh: 他的神蹟多麼偉大， 他的奇事多麼有力； 他的國是永遠的國，

en: I, Nebuchadnezzar, was at ease in my house and prospering in my palace.
zh: “我尼布甲尼撒安逸地住在家中，在宮裡享受榮華富貴。

en: I saw a dream that made me afraid. As I lay in bed the fancies and the visions of my head alarmed me.
zh: 我作了一個夢，這夢使我懼怕；我在床上所見的夢幻和我腦海中出現的異象，都使我驚惶。

en: So I made a decree that all the wise men of Babylon should be brought before me, that they might make known to me the interpretation of the dream.
zh: 我就下令把巴比倫所有的智慧人，都帶到我面前來，要他們把夢的意思向我說明。

en: Then the magicians, the enchanters, the Chaldeans, and the astrologers came in, and I told them the dream, but they could not make known to me its interpretation.
zh: 於是術士、用法術的、迦勒底人和占星家都進來；我當面把那夢告訴了他們，可是他們卻不能把夢的意思向我說明。

en: At last Daniel came in before me- he who was named Belteshazzar after the name of my god, and in whom is the spirit of the holy gods- and I told him the dream, saying,
zh: “最後，那照著我神的名，稱為伯提沙撒的但以理，來到我面前，他裡面有聖神的靈，我就把夢告訴他：

en: "O Belteshazzar, chief of the magicians, because I know that the spirit of the holy gods is in you and that no mystery is too difficult for you, tell me the visions of my dream that I saw and their interpretation.
zh: ‘術士的領袖伯提沙撒啊！因為我知道你裡面有聖神的靈，沒有甚麼隱祕的事能難倒你；因此，你要把我夢中所見的異象和夢的意思告訴我。

en: The visions of my head as I lay in bed were these: I saw, and behold, a tree in the midst of the earth, and its height was great.
zh: 我躺在床上時腦海中所見的異象是這樣： 我看見大地中間， 有一棵樹，十分高大。

en: The tree grew and became strong, and its top reached to heaven, and it was visible to the end of the whole earth.
zh: 那樹漸長，而且堅強， 高達於天， 地極所有的人都看得到。

en: Its leaves were beautiful and its fruit abundant, and in it was food for all. The beasts of the field found shade under it, and the birds of the heavens lived in its branches, and all flesh was fed from it.
zh: 它的葉子美麗，果實繁多， 所有的生物都從它得到食物； 野地的走獸在它下面歇息， 空中的飛鳥棲宿在它的枝頭上； 各種生物都從它得著供養。

en: "I saw in the visions of my head as I lay in bed, and behold, a watcher, a holy one, came down from heaven.
zh: “‘我躺在床上，在我腦海出現的異象中，我看見有一位守望者，就是聖者，從天上下來，

en: He proclaimed aloud and said thus: 'Chop down the tree and lop off its branches, strip off its leaves and scatter its fruit. Let the beasts flee from under it and the birds from its branches.
zh: 大聲呼叫，這樣說： 你們要砍下這樹，削斷枝子， 搖落葉子，打散果子， 把樹下的走獸趕散， 把樹枝上的飛鳥趕走。

en: But leave the stump of its roots in the earth, bound with a band of iron and bronze, amid the tender grass of the field. Let him be wet with the dew of heaven. Let his portion be with the beasts in the grass of the earth.
zh: 然而，樹根的餘幹卻要留在地上， 用鐵和銅的鍊子圍住， 留在野地的青草中， 使他被天露滴濕； 使他像走獸一樣在地上的草叢中得他的分。

en: Let his mind be changed from a man's, and let a beast's mind be given to him; and let seven periods of time pass over him.
zh: 使他的心改變，不再是人的心， 給他一個獸心， 使他經過七年的時期。

en: The sentence is by the decree of the watchers, the decision by the word of the holy ones, to the end that the living may know that the Most High rules the kingdom of men and gives it to whom he will and sets over it the lowliest of men.'
zh: 這是守望者宣告的裁決， 是聖者頒布的決定， 好使世人都知道： 至高者在世人的國中掌權， 他喜歡把國賜給誰，就賜給誰， 甚至立最卑微的人執掌國權。

en: This dream I, King Nebuchadnezzar, saw. And you, O Belteshazzar, tell me the interpretation, because all the wise men of my kingdom are not able to make known to me the interpretation, but you are able, for the spirit of the holy gods is in you."
zh: “‘這就是我尼布甲尼撒王所作的夢。伯提沙撒啊！你要把這夢的意思告訴我，因為我國中所有的智慧人都不能把夢的意思向我說明；只有你能，因為你裡面有聖神的靈。’”

en: Then Daniel, whose name was Belteshazzar, was dismayed for a while, and his thoughts alarmed him. The king answered and said, "Belteshazzar, let not the dream or the interpretation alarm you." Belteshazzar answered and said, "My lord, may the dream be for those who hate you and its interpretation for your enemies!
zh: 於是那稱為伯提沙撒的但以理驚愕片時，他想到的事使他驚惶。王對他說：“伯提沙撒啊！別讓這夢和夢的意思使你驚惶。”伯提沙撒回答說：“我主啊！願這夢歸給憎恨你的人，夢的意思歸給你的敵人。

en: The tree you saw, which grew and became strong, so that its top reached to heaven, and it was visible to the end of the whole earth,
zh: 你所見的樹漸長，而且堅強，高達於天，全地的人都看得到。

en: whose leaves were beautiful and its fruit abundant, and in which was food for all, under which beasts of the field found shade, and in whose branches the birds of the heavens lived-
zh: 它的葉子美麗，果實繁多，所有的生物都從它得到食物；野地的走獸住在它下面，空中的飛鳥棲在它的枝頭上。

en: it is you, O king, who have grown and become strong. Your greatness has grown and reaches to heaven, and your dominion to the ends of the earth.
zh: 王啊！你就是那樹，越來越偉大堅強；你的威勢漸長，高達於天；你的權柄直到地極。

en: And because the king saw a watcher, a holy one, coming down from heaven and saying, 'Chop down the tree and destroy it, but leave the stump of its roots in the earth, bound with a band of iron and bronze, in the tender grass of the field, and let him be wet with the dew of heaven, and let his portion be with the beasts of the field, till seven periods of time pass over him,'
zh: 王既然看見一位守望者，就是聖者，從天上下來，說：‘你們要砍下毀壞這樹，樹根的餘幹卻要留在地上，用鐵和銅的鍊子圍住，留在野地的青草中，使他被天露滴濕；使他的分和野地的走獸一樣，直到他經過那七年的時期。’

en: this is the interpretation, O king: It is a decree of the Most High, which has come upon my lord the king,
zh: 王啊！夢的意思就是這樣：這臨到我主我王的事，是至高者的裁決。

en: that you shall be driven from among men, and your dwelling shall be with the beasts of the field. You shall be made to eat grass like an ox, and you shall be wet with the dew of heaven, and seven periods of time shall pass over you, till you know that the Most High rules the kingdom of men and gives it to whom he will.
zh: 你必被趕逐，離開人群，和野地的走獸同住；你必像牛一樣吃草，被天露滴濕，要經過七年的時期；等到你承認至高者在世人的國中掌權，他喜歡把國賜給誰，就賜給誰。

en: And as it was commanded to leave the stump of the roots of the tree, your kingdom shall be confirmed for you from the time that you know that Heaven rules.
zh: 守望者既然吩咐要留下樹根的餘幹，所以，等到你承認上天的至高者是掌權的，你的國就必再歸給你。

en: Therefore, O king, let my counsel be acceptable to you: break off your sins by practicing righteousness, and your iniquities by showing mercy to the oppressed, that there may perhaps be a lengthening of your prosperity."
zh: 因此，王啊！請你接納我的勸告，施行公義，斷絕罪過，憐憫受欺壓者，斷絕罪孽，你的平安或者可以延長。”

en: All this came upon King Nebuchadnezzar.
zh: 這一切事都在尼布甲尼撒王身上實現了。

en: At the end of twelve months he was walking on the roof of the royal palace of Babylon,
zh: 過了十二個月，王在巴比倫王宮的平頂上散步的時候，

en: and the king answered and said, "Is not this great Babylon, which I have built by my mighty power as a royal residence and for the glory of my majesty?"
zh: 他說：“這大巴比倫城不是我用大能大力建造作我的京都，為顯我威嚴的榮耀嗎？”

en: While the words were still in the king's mouth, there fell a voice from heaven, "O King Nebuchadnezzar, to you it is spoken: The kingdom has departed from you,
zh: 這話在王的口中還沒有說完，就有聲音從天上傳下來，說：“尼布甲尼撒王啊！有話對你說：你的王權被褫奪了。

en: and you shall be driven from among men, and your dwelling shall be with the beasts of the field. And you shall be made to eat grass like an ox, and seven periods of time shall pass over you, until you know that the Most High rules the kingdom of men and gives it to whom he will."
zh: 你必被趕逐，離開人群，和野地的走獸同住；你必像牛一樣吃草，要經過七年的時期；等到你承認至高者在世人的國中掌權，他喜歡把國賜給誰，就賜給誰。”

en: Immediately the word was fulfilled against Nebuchadnezzar. He was driven from among men and ate grass like an ox, and his body was wet with the dew of heaven till his hair grew as long as eagles' feathers, and his nails were like birds' claws.
zh: 這話立刻就應驗在尼布甲尼撒身上；他被趕逐，離開人群，像牛一樣吃草，身體被天露滴濕，直到他的頭髮長得像鷹毛，指甲像鳥爪。

en: At the end of the days I, Nebuchadnezzar, lifted my eyes to heaven, and my reason returned to me, and I blessed the Most High, and praised and honored him who lives forever, for his dominion is an everlasting dominion, and his kingdom endures from generation to generation;
zh: “七年的日子滿了，我尼布甲尼撒舉目望天，我的理智恢復過來，我就稱頌至高者，讚美尊崇活到永遠的 神。 他的統治永無窮盡， 他的國度直到萬代。

en: all the inhabitants of the earth are accounted as nothing, and he does according to his will among the host of heaven and among the inhabitants of the earth; and none can stay his hand or say to him, "What have you done?"
zh: 地上所有的居民，在他來說都是虛無； 在天上的萬軍中，他憑自己的意旨行事； 在地上的居民中，也是這樣； 沒有人能攔住他的手， 或問他說：‘你作甚麼？’

en: At the same time my reason returned to me, and for the glory of my kingdom, my majesty and splendor returned to me. My counselors and my lords sought me, and I was established in my kingdom, and still more greatness was added to me.
zh: “那時，我的理智恢復過來後，為著我國的光榮，我的威嚴和光輝也都恢復過來了。我的謀臣和官員仍來求見我，我的王權重新堅立，我的權勢越發增加。

en: Now I, Nebuchadnezzar, praise and extol and honor the King of heaven, for all his works are right and his ways are just; and those who walk in pride he is able to humble.
zh: 現在我尼布甲尼撒讚美、尊崇、榮耀天上的王，因為他所作的一切都正確，他所行的也都公平；行為驕傲的，他都能貶低。”
